title: FRQ grader actually works now
body: Fixed some bugs in the FRQ grader that were giving inaccurate scores. Grading is now more accurate — re-grade any essays that felt off.

title: AP Gov Unit 3 vocab list refreshed
body: The Civil Liberties and Civil Rights study guide now matches what your teachers actually highlight — every bolded vocab term plus the AP-required Supreme Court cases (Engel, Tinker, Brown, etc.) and foundational documents (Bill of Rights, Letter from a Birmingham Jail).

title: We'll show what's new each visit
body: When something changes on the site, you'll see a quick popup the first time you come back. Just X it out to keep practicing.

title: Drill answers accept common abbreviations
body: Federalist papers now accept 'fed 10' or 'federalist 10'. Parenthetical aliases like 'elastic clause' work for 'Necessary and Proper Clause'. World War I and World War 1 are treated the same.
